title: helichrysum italicum var. serotinum
intro: Helichrysum italicum var. serotinum, also known as Serotinum, is a variety of the Everlasting plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. The herbal preparations of Helichrysum italicum var. serotinum include essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used to make topical creams, salves, and tinctures for various health applications.
